texto: Knowing why we are married & should stay married is crucial. The key question is: Will we approach marriage from a God-centered view or a man-centered view? In a man-centered view, we will maintain our marriage as long as our earthly comforts, desires, & expectations are met. In a God-centered view, we preserve our marriage because it brings glory to God & points a sinful world to a reconciling Creator.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de G. Thomas que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “Knowing why we are married & should stay married is crucial. The key question is: Will we approac…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sucesso, desire, marriage, com foco em casamento e marriage.
